goals: Explore available unit conversion categories relevant to transportation planning
Learn about speed unit options for comparing international road speed limits
Convert US speed limits to metric for international road technology comparison
Convert distance measurements for road infrastructure planning
Explore weight unit options for vehicle weight limit regulations

user_agent_config.personality: Pragmatic and detail-oriented, focused on practical applications for transportation infrastructure. Prefers gathering comprehensive information before making decisions.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Experienced in transportation regulations and road standards but unfamiliar with unit conversion tools or APIs. Knows metric and imperial systems are used differently across countries but relies on assistance for precise conversions.

end_condition: The user has explored relevant unit categories, learned about speed and weight unit options, and completed necessary conversions for comparing international road technology standards.
